description: 6-dimension evaluation rubric for agent visual identity. Score each dimension 1-10, average for final score.

dimensions.name: Form Readability
dimensions.description: Can a viewer understand what kind of thing this is within 3 seconds? Is the topology (1D/2D/3D/graph) immediately clear?

score_guide.7-8: Clear topology, memorable at a glance
score_guide.9-10: Instantly readable AND distinctive — couldn't be mistaken for anything else

dimensions.name: 3D Presence
dimensions.description: Does it feel like it exists in 3D space, not painted on a flat canvas? Does it have depth, volume, parallax?

score_guide.1-4: Looks flat despite being 3D — no real depth perception
score_guide.5-6: Some depth but feels like a 2D illustration
score_guide.7-8: Clear 3D presence, moves with convincing depth
score_guide.9-10: Physically present — feels like you could reach into the screen

dimensions.name: Bloom Quality
dimensions.description: Is the glow/bloom tuned correctly? No green halos, no flat no-glow, no overpowering blur. Bloom radius is the most sensitive parameter.

score_guide.1-4: Broken bloom — green cloud, or so bright everything is white
score_guide.5-6: Bloom present but radius too wide or threshold wrong
score_guide.7-8: Clean bloom that enhances the form without dominating
score_guide.9-10: Bloom feels like the form is actually emitting light

dimensions.key_param: bloom.radius — start at 0.35, tune from there. Do NOT start at 0.58.

dimensions.name: Scene Hierarchy
dimensions.description: Is there a clear visual hierarchy? One dominant element, supporting elements, background. Does the eye know where to look?

score_guide.1-4: Everything fights for attention equally — visual noise
score_guide.5-6: Loose hierarchy — main element mostly visible
score_guide.9-10: Effortless hierarchy — eye is guided naturally, nothing feels wrong

dimensions.name: Alive Quality
dimensions.description: Does it feel alive when animated? Is it NEVER fully still? Does motion feel organic rather than mechanical?

score_guide.1-4: Looks like a rotating logo — mechanical, repetitive
score_guide.7-8: Organic motion — never quite the same twice
score_guide.9-10: Unmistakably alive — feels like it has intention

dimensions.key_technique: Detuned harmonic speedMult values ensure the form never returns to exactly the same state

dimensions.name: Color Narrative
dimensions.description: Does color mean something? Is there a consistent warm/cool or high/low energy story across ALL glow layers? Conflicting color layers cancel the message.

score_guide.5-6: Color present but inconsistent across layers
score_guide.7-8: Clear color story visible in 2+ layers
score_guide.9-10: All layers tell the same color story — spine, glow tube, sprites all agree

dimensions.key_insight: If one glow layer contradicts the others, it cancels the entire color narrative. Fix the outlier first.

benchmarks.below_7: Needs significant work — identify the lowest scoring dimension and fix it first
benchmarks.7_to_8: Solid foundation — tune bloom radius and check color narrative consistency
benchmarks.8_to_9: Good — look for the one thing that feels wrong and fix it
benchmarks.9_plus: Excellent — the form communicates something true about the agent

scoring_method.for_agents: Score what you can from code review. Mark visually-dependent dimensions as 'pending_visual' if you cannot see the output. The rubric is still valuable — structural issues (bloom radius, color layer consistency, endpoint handling) are code-reviewable.
scoring_method.ask_human: If you have a human collaborator, share the live URL and ask them to score the visually-dependent dimensions.
